005 — Team

The boring
people.

Scientists and engineers who believe that the most important work is the kind that doesn't need hype to stand up.

Founders
CEO & Co-Founder · Operations
Suman Mishra, M.Sc.
Data Scientist and Certified Pharmacovigilance Quality Reviewer building the infrastructure for next-generation drug discovery and precision medicine.
📍 California, USA
CSO & Co-Founder · Science
Sasi Kumar Jagadeesan, PhD, M.Eng (Med), DABRM

boring science?
